case_title: ROSEN BIEN GALVAN & GRUNFELD LLP VS. SALLY SWANSON ARCHITECTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ROSEN BIEN GALVAN & GRUNFELD LLP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GAY GRUNFELD, PARTNER/OWNER. DEFENDANT SALLY SWANSON ARCHITESTS, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSEN BIEN GALVAN & GRUNFELD LLP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2022 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SALLY SWANSON ARCHITECTS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSEN BIEN GALVAN & GRUNFELD LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALLY SWANSON ARCHITECTS, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,130.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
